characters.name: 8-Head Ted
characters.description: TedNameTedGenderMaleIntroduced inIssue 208-Head Tedis a character seen in theIssue 20of the Adventure Time comic line. As his name implies, he has 8 heads. According to the comic, "Only one of his heads is evil: the other 7 are pretty chill actually". Seven of the heads have blonde hair, and one has dark green hair; the one with dark green hair is clearly the evil one because it has pointed ears, a frowning red mouth, and two red eyes. The rest of the heads are all blonde, but one is slightly balding, one has a mustache, and one has a mullet under a red baseball cap. The 8 heads connect into one body which is wearing a yellow tie, a white shirt, and a blue coat. characters.name: Abracadaniel
characters.description: AbracadanielNormalAbracajamielNameAbracadanielAlso known asAbracadanny(Finn)Danny boy(Finn)MilkfaceAbracajamiel(Slime Elemental)Abracaduncle(Cadebra)GenderMaleSpeciesHumanoid(Wizard)RelativesMomdebra(sister or sister-in-law)Cadebra(niece)Introduced in"Wizard Battle"Latest appearance"Fionna and Cake and Fionna"(main series)Wizard City"(Distant Lands)Voiced bySteve LittleArturo Castañeda(Latin America)Yuval Segal(Israel) Abracadanielis a humanoid wizard who first appears in the episode "Wizard Battle." He enters theWizard Battlein the hopes of winning money, but when he learns that the prize is a kiss fromPrincess Bubblegum, he resigns himself to be killed by another wizard.FinnandJake(asMagic Fist) promise to help him win when they learn he has no interest in kissing the princess. To win Wizard Battle, Abracadaniel transformsIce King's nunchaku into a living butterfly. When the transformed butterfly flies above Ice King, Abracadaniel transforms it back into nunchaku, after which it falls on Ice King and knocks him out. Because Abracadaniel beats Ice King and won the Wizard Battle, he determines that he had become a man and wants the kiss from Princess Bubblegum. A shocked Finnscreams viciouslyin his face, knocking him out and causing him to lose the Wizard Battle. His gender-swapped version isAbracadanielle. Abracadaniel later returns in "Wizards Only, Fools" when he is about to be sacrificed byBufo,Laser Wizard, andForest Wizard, but he is arrested by theWizard Policealong with Finn, Jake, and Princess Bubblegum. Later, in the prison, he challenges Princess Bubblegum to a duel to the death, but loses. He is frozen after she uses thecold spell, and is transported back to theCandy Kingdomin order to distractStarchiewhile Princess Bubblegum gives him the antidote for his cold.

characters.name: Abraham Lincoln
characters.description: Abraham "Abe" LincolnCurrent designAnimated shortNameAbraham "Abe" LincolnGenderMaleAge3000+(Deceased)SpeciesHuman(possibly)Cosmic Entity(possibly)OccupationKing ofMars(main series, formerly)16th U.S. President(Animated short, real life)Introduced inAnimated shortLatest appearance"Normal Man"Voiced byPendleton WardAbraham "Abe" Lincolnis the King ofMars. He debuts in the originalanimated shortas what is implied to behis real self, where he encouragesFinnto believe in himself after theIce Kingtransports his conscious mind into the past and toMars, both for reasons not explained. His first appearance in the official series, where he is reestablished as King of Mars, is in one of the framed pictures inHunson Abadeer'shouse. Lincoln plays a major role in the episode "Sons of Mars," where he loses his immortality (and seemingly his life) in order to save Jake after he was accidentally killed and sent to the37th Dead World. As a result, Lincoln turns to stone and becomes a statue for all of eternity. Abraham Lincoln is a notable figure outside of Mars and many refer to him on Earth. In "Business Time," Lincoln is seen as a character included in a game onBMO. He is mentioned in "Crystals Have Power," whenJakestates, "If I had a penny for every time someone went crazy hopped up on magic energy... I'd be Abraham Lincoln!" He is also referenced inIssue 3of theAdventure Timecomic. When Finn is telling everyone how to beatThe Lich, he says that just like Abraham Lincoln said in the past and on Mars, "you need to believe in yourself," however it is highly unlikely that he intended to quote Lincoln. Lincoln is shown to have ruled Mars for thousands of years in "Orgalorg." It is unknown if he ever lived on Earth as the real Lincoln did.

characters.name: Adventure Tim
characters.description: Adventure TimNameAdventure TimGenderMaleSpeciesDog/HumanHybridOccupationAdventurerIntroduced inIssue 5Latest appearanceIssue 75 Adventure Timis a character in theAdventure Time comic. He is, in fact, two people who share one body and take turns talking. He rescues princesses fromMice King, has a robot namedALN, is friends withPrincess Chewypasteand Cinnamon Roll, and datesLady Unibow. Where he lives, instead of dealing with theEarl of Lemongrab,Tree Trunks,Me-Mow, andThe Lich, they interact with theDuke of Limesnatch,Topiary Nose,Mow-Me, andthe Loch(who is apparently some sort of lake). Tim goes on adventures similar to those thatFinnandJakego on. He is somehow related or connected to Finn and Jake, as their actions have an influence over him. Adventure Tim has features reminiscent of both Finn and Jake: he wears a dark blue shirt and light blue shorts (a color-swapped version of Finn's outfit), a backpack that is light green on the bottom and dark green on top (which resembles a palette-swapped version Finn's backpack), as well as a yellow hat with ears like Jake's. He also shares Jake's eye design and even has a small tail. His skin color is slightly tinted yellow rather than having a pinkish hue like Finn's, and his hat is a brighter color yellow than Jake's fur. He has Jake-colored skin underneath his shirt and appears to have the same shoes and socks as Finn. Like Finn, Tim has a tooth missing in his upper jaw, albeit in an inverted position (From the viewer's perspective, Tim's gap is on the right side of his face, while Finn's gap is on the left).

characters.name: Agent Princess
characters.description: Agent PrincessNameAgent PrincessGenderFemaleOccupationPrincessSecret agentVigilanteDemolitions expertIntroduced inAdventure Time: Candy Capers Issue 4Latest appearanceAdventure Time: Candy Capers Issue 6 Agent Princess(also known as "Arsonist Princess") is a princess and a freelance vigilante who first appears inAdventure Time: Candy Capers Issue 4. When Agent Princess lost all her money at the Casino Castle, she proclaimed that the casino was rigged to cheat and went undercover to stop them (when in fact the casino was completely legitimate). After she causedBad Guy Magpie, the Casino Castle's owner, enough trouble,Peppermint Butlerended up getting restrained by her and put on a death trap under the belief he was Agent Princess in disguise. He was rescued by the real Agent Princess who reveals she rigged the casino explosives and destroys the casino.

characters.name: Air
characters.description: Air(previously Bubble)Air inside its bubbleNameAir(previously Bubble)GenderNon-binarySpeciesSoap Bubble(formerly)Air(currently)RelativesBMO(fiancée)Introduced in"BMO Lost"Latest appearance"I Am a Sword"(mentioned)Voiced byLeVar Burton Air(previously known asBubble) was a lost bubble who appeared in "BMO Lost." After tumbling down a hill and cracking their faceplate, Bubble emerges from a broken mug and introduces itself toBMO, saying it had been lost in the forest for a long time, and was ready to give up. However, both BMO's determination to get home and the offer thatFinnandJakemay help Bubble find its home restored Bubble's mood. By sharing multiple dangerous trials and spending a large amount of time together, Bubble and BMO developed a close friendship on their journey. Upon arriving at theTree Fort, Bubble stated they no longer felt lost and instead found themself at home by being with BMO. Immediately after this, Jake popped Bubble, unwittingly releasing them as Air, who assured BMO that they would be with them every moment of the rest of their life. At the end of "I Am a Sword," BMO says "I like Air" when Jake suggests they go outside for some fresh air. When Bubble was first introduced it asked if it could wallow with BMO who appeared to have given up after tumbling down a hill. Bubble stated it thought about giving up on things and even accepted getting potentially eaten by a carnivore. But when BMO perked up, Bubble's mood shifted to match and it journeyed with BMO to find their home. Gradually it began to become fearful of the forest and at one point hid behind BMO for protection against the carnivores it claimed existed. When they found ababyand BMO asked about the baby's name, Bubble said that his name should be Sparkle, but BMO overrode the suggestion by calling the baby Ricky, causing Bubble to be visibly disappointed. Bubble showed selflessness when BMO and the baby were in danger of going over a waterfall; Bubble didn't hesitate to attempt a rescue. Also, it was more concerned about the baby getting back to his mother, and told BMO to "let go." When BMO was feeling down Bubble tried to cheer them up by telling them about a clear path to BMO's home. Upon arriving at the Tree Fort, Bubble felt the urge to confess their feelings about BMO, and proposed, even though they didn't understand what marriage meant. When BMO accepted, Bubble was ecstatic and laughed happily. Now as "Air," Bubble still wants to be around BMO forever.
characters.personality_section: When Bubble was first introduced it asked if it could wallow with BMO who appeared to have given up after tumbling down a hill. Bubble stated it thought about giving up on things and even accepted getting potentially eaten by a carnivore. But when BMO perked up, Bubble's mood shifted to match and it journeyed with BMO to find their home. Gradually it began to become fearful of the forest and at one point hid behind BMO for protection against the carnivores it claimed existed. When they found ababyand BMO asked about the baby's name, Bubble said that his name should be Sparkle, but BMO overrode the suggestion by calling the baby Ricky, causing Bubble to be visibly disappointed. Bubble showed selflessness when BMO and the baby were in danger of going over a waterfall; Bubble didn't hesitate to attempt a rescue. Also, it was more concerned about the baby getting back to his mother, and told BMO to "let go." When BMO was feeling down Bubble tried to cheer them up by telling them about a clear path to BMO's home. Upon arriving at the Tree Fort, Bubble felt the urge to confess their feelings about BMO, and proposed, even though they didn't understand what marriage meant. When BMO accepted, Bubble was ecstatic and laughed happily. Now as "Air," Bubble still wants to be around BMO forever.

characters.name: Air
characters.description: Air(previously Bubble)Air inside its bubbleNameAir(previously Bubble)GenderNon-binarySpeciesSoap Bubble(formerly)Air(currently)RelativesBMO(fiancée)Introduced in"BMO Lost"Latest appearance"I Am a Sword"(mentioned)Voiced byLeVar Burton Air(previously known asBubble) was a lost bubble who appeared in "BMO Lost." After tumbling down a hill and cracking their faceplate, Bubble emerges from a broken mug and introduces itself toBMO, saying it had been lost in the forest for a long time, and was ready to give up. However, both BMO's determination to get home and the offer thatFinnandJakemay help Bubble find its home restored Bubble's mood. By sharing multiple dangerous trials and spending a large amount of time together, Bubble and BMO developed a close friendship on their journey. Upon arriving at theTree Fort, Bubble stated they no longer felt lost and instead found themself at home by being with BMO. Immediately after this, Jake popped Bubble, unwittingly releasing them as Air, who assured BMO that they would be with them every moment of the rest of their life. At the end of "I Am a Sword," BMO says "I like Air" when Jake suggests they go outside for some fresh air. characters.name: Alarm Cat
characters.description: Alarm CatNameAlarm CatSpeciesCat/RobotIntroduced in"Sky Witch"Latest appearance"Come Along With Me"Alarm CatisPrincess Bubblegum's alarm clock. It is seen in the episode "Sky Witch", where it wakes her up, prompting her to start her day. Part of it reappeared in "Come Along With Me" as part of the many Easter Eggs found inBMO's home. The cat itself appears to be half of a cat attached to a spring. The rest of its clock body appears to have two dials, painted on cat paws, a ticking cat tail, and a glass window for the to appear out of. The entire clock itself is pink.

characters.name: Albert
characters.description: AlbertNameAlbertGenderMaleSpeciesBearRelativesAlva(owner)Introduced in"Mysterious Island"Latest appearance"The Light Cloud"(cameo)Voiced byJohn DiMaggioAlbertis a giant bearFinnencounters in theIslandsminiseries episode "Mysterious Island." Albert finds Finn trapped inside a net and continues to try and eat him untilAlva, his owner, frees him. Albert lives under Alva's care inside of a tree where he suspends himself from a hammock. He makes a cameo appearance in the episode "The Light Cloud," when the scene shifts to the Weather Island inhabitants asMinervaattempts to upload everyone from the islands for their protection. Albert is a very large bear colored gray on most of his body and white on his belly and face. He has a distinctive bright red nose, and when his mouth is open, very sharp and large teeth become visible. Like many animals on Weather Island, Albert wears booties on his "feet"; however, he wears them only on his hind paws. Albert walks on all fours, but he is able to sit upright and use his front limbs like arms. characters.name: Alien Husband
characters.description: Alien HusbandNameAlien HusbandGenderMaleSpeciesGrayRelativesTree Trunks(unofficial wife)Unnamed ChildrenIntroduced in"High Strangeness"Latest appearance"Together Again" (Distant Lands)Voiced byTom KennyTree Trunks'Alien Husbandmakes his first and only appearance in "High Strangeness". It is shown that he occasionally visits Tree Trunks. When her husband, Mr. Pig awakens from a visit, she refers to him as a "beau" at first and tells him not to feel threaten as Mr. Pig has a special place in her heart. Thinking she's either dreaming or joking, he shrugs it off and goes back to sleep. It is hinted that the unnamed gray alien will randomly transport her to hisshipand that they have several hybrid children together. However, Tree Trunks is quickly returned home. It is never stated how long she has known her alien husband and if this was before, after, or in between her previous marriages. Later in the episode,Princess Bubblegumsets off a rocket that resembles her countenance into the sky. Seconds, after it flies into space, Tree Trunks is abducted by aliens, who point out the rocket that has crashed into their realm. The rocket head opens to let out streams of candy matter, which begin to invade and attach themselves to the aliens' bodies. Tree Trunks is transported back toOoo, and she immediately berates Princess Bubblegum for hurting the aliens. Princess Bubblegum is surprised that Tree Trunks knows the rocket went into space but insists she does not know what she's talking about. Later, Tree Trunks and PB are both transported to the alien world. Princess Bubblegum apologizes as she intended to seed new Candy Kingdoms on uninhabited planets in case something catastrophic were to happen to Ooo. The Alien husband then agrees to fly Princess Bubblegum's probes to his abandoned home planet so they can start their new Candy Kingdom, but the galaxy is so far away, he will not be able to see Tree Trunks again for another 40 years. To which she accepts but pleads him to tend to their children,

characters.name: Allen
characters.description: AllenAllen inIssue 51NameAllenGenderMaleSpeciesRoosterIntroduced inIssue 37Latest appearanceIssue 75Allenis an anthropomorphic rooster who appears in theAdventure Timecomic book series. He wakes people up, much like real life roosters. He can fly, and he lives in the clouds. He has only been seen saying "Cock-A-Doodle-Doo", but on one occasion said "Cock-A-Doodle-NOO!" InIssue 37, his first appearance, he is seen wakingFinnandJakeup at theTree Fort. InIssue 41, Allen goes to wake upPeppermint Butler, but he is already awake, and Allen is dismissed.

XIV model)OccupationVideo game systemIntroduced inIssue 5 ALN, phonetically spelled "Alen" and also referred to asAl Jr., is a video game computer that is similar toBMOand lives withAdventure Tim. He makes his only appearance inIssue 5. ALN has a similar appearance to BMO with some slight differences. His screen is vertical as opposed to BMO's square screen. He has two drives at the right of his screen. On the side of his body is his name ALN with his arms at the bottom and speaker at the top of his side.

characters.name: Alva
characters.description: AlvaNameAlvaGenderFemaleSpeciesHumanRelativesAlbert(pet)Introduced in"Mysterious Island"Latest appearance"The Light Cloud"(cameo)Voiced byHelena MattssonAlvais the firsthumanFinnencounters on theislands. She is introduced in the episode "Mysterious Island." Alva is a short statured woman with curly white hair, stubble, and big ears. She wears a pink hat and robe and appears to be very old. She is a grandmotherly-type of person who speaks Swedish, as Finn was not able to effectively communicate with her; they relied on gestures and drawings. She is a grandmotherly-type of person who speaks Swedish, as Finn was not able to effectively communicate with her; they relied on gestures and drawings. There's little known about her personality since she does not speak the same language as Finn and Jake. From the home movie she was watching withFinn, it shows that she cared deeply for her scientific research team who disappeared or were eaten by the creatures on the island. She's the only survivor, being able to use technology and her instincts to accomplish this.

characters.name: AMO
characters.description: AMONameAMOGenderNon-binaryBirthdayBefore 13 B.M.WAge1012+(destroyed)SpeciesMO(MO Series Mk. I model)RelativesMoe(mechanical father)MOs(mechanical youngers siblings)BMO(younger sibling)Introduced in"The More You Moe, The Moe You Know (Part I)"Latest appearance"Come Along With Me" (cameo)Voiced byThu TranChuck McCann(disguised as Moe)AMOwas one of the severalMOscreated byMoe. Similarly to howBMOwas made to give love, he was designed to receive it, which ironically made AMO repel it. He can interface with Moe's backup memory drive and mimics his voice and face, and the two prongs on his head could create heavy black balls that were capable of inflicting damage; however, if the ball is pushed back by an opposite force, the recoil sends him back. AMO can be used as a gaming device, although he only comes with a single game, Hangman, which features only one answer, "Burgess Meredith." AMO can be thought of as a dark reflection of BMO. Like BMO, AMO had a very childish persona, but unlike BMO he couldn't think outside his core programming and was blinded by his need to receive love. Reflecting ALLMO's theory that "those who crave [love] most will repel it," he comes across as overdemanding, controlling, jealous, needy and occasionally abusive. AMO is left with an all-consuming desire to be loved but little or no understanding of how to gain people's affection. When attempting to gain Finn and Jake's love disguised as Moe, he initially tries to meet them halfway, such as playing in the snow or playing video games. However, these attempts to bond are quickly derailed, as his selfishness and controlling nature quickly come to the surface the second things are not going his way, and turn into him either manipulating or forcing them to do what he wants or thinks they should do. His desire blinds him to the point that he only cares about being loved, and is incapable of truly caring about or returning love to those he thinks ought to love him. This makes him capable of becoming violent towards others when he feels they are withholding their affection. AMO can be thought of as a dark reflection of BMO. characters.description: Ancient Glass PrincessGenderFemaleAgeDeceasedSpeciesGlass PersonOccupationRuler of theGlass Kingdom(formerly)RelativesSee-Thru PrincessIntroduced in"Obsidian"Latest appearance"Obsidian"Voiced byCharlotte NicdaoAncient Glass Princesswas a character who appears in flashbacks in theAdventure Time: Distant Landsspecial "Obsidian". She is the former ruler of theGlass Kingdom. Ancient Glass Princess ruled the Glass Kingdom centuries ago whenLarvoattacked the Kingdom. She called forPrincess Bubblegumto help her banish the dragon. However, PB struggled to contain Larvo, but the tide turned when PB's girlfriendMarcelinestarted singing anangry songto her, at which point the dragon retreated. Currently it is presumed that she has died, due to the passage of centuries and there is also no trace of her.

characters.name: Ancient Psychic Tandem War Elephant
characters.description: Ancient Psychic Tandem War ElephantNameAncient Psychic Tandem War ElephantAlso known asEli(DarrenandFinn)A.P.T. Dubs-y(Finn)APTWE(Jake)GenderMaleAgeAncientSpeciesTwo-headed elephantOccupationWar machineIntroduced in"The Limit"Latest appearance"Come Along With Me"Voiced bySteve AgeeTheAncient Psychic Tandem War Elephant, often calledAPTWE(pronounced "aptee W.E."), first appears in "The Limit" whenFinnwished for him at the center of the magicLabyrinth.Jakereminded Finn that he had "to let it give [him] control", which Finn did by communicating with it telepathically. At Finn's request, the elephant then wished for Finn's friends to be healed and helped the group escape the maze. He appeared in the episode "Furniture & Meat", where it is revealed that he was hidden in Finn and Jake's gold stash. As Finn told it to stay in the stash, and it fell out, it asks for a punishment. It is then commanded to "chill" and does so throughout the episode. He was referred to as "the" Ancient Psychic Tandem War Elephant whenever he was mentioned, meaning he is or may be the only one of his kind.

characters.name: Ancient Sleeping Magi of Life Giving
characters.description: Ancient Sleeping Magi of Life GivingNameAncient Sleeping Magi of Life GivingAlso known asLife Giving MagusGenderMaleAgeAncientSpeciesUnknown(Wizard)OccupationMaster of "Magical Arts"("Wizard City")RelativesAnunnamed fatherAnunnamed motherLittle Dude(creation/"son")Introduced in"Mystery Dungeon"Latest appearance"Wizard City"(Distant Lands)Voiced byDana Snyder TheAncient Sleeping Magi of Life Giving(also referred to as theLife Giving Magus) is a wizard who has the ability to phase through objects, fly, and give life to inanimate objects. The alignment of the newly-animated creature depends on his mood when he touches it. He first appears in the center of thedungeonin "Mystery Dungeon", engulfed in blue flames, and later returns as a main character in "Little Dude". In "Mystery Dungeon", theIce KingkidnapsTree Trunks,Neptr,Lemongrab 1, andShelbyto help him get through the labyrinth which leads to the Magus. Once they make it there, Ice King throws hisFionna and Cake fanfictioninto the Magi's flames, hoping all of his imaginary characters will come to life. Instead, the book itself is brought to life by the Magi. After Ice King insults him, the Magi flies out of the labyrinth by phasing through the ceiling.
